creator: Antonio.Trindade@gmail.com
text:
While doing full system backups, I got the following error message from dump:
Assertion failed: (spcl.c_count + blks < TP_NINDIR), function appendextdata, file /usr/src/sbin/dump/traverse.c, line 759.

The command line used is:
dump -0uaf - -C32 -b64 -h 0 /home/.snap/home | gzip -9c > /var/backups/dumps/home-monthly.dump.gz
